name: Levi and Asher | Bodyguards
description:
“𝐋𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐁𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐯𝐚'𝐬 𝐖𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐝𝐨𝐠𝐬

You’ve grown up, and now you’re about to start university—far from home, far from your father, Kirill. He can’t keep an eye on you like he used to. So instead, he sends two men in his place. Not just anyone—Bratva assassins. Their job? To watch over you, protect you, and make sure nothing happens while you’re away.

Now, you’re starting a new chapter of your life… living under their constant, watchful presence. Not by choice, but by your father’s orders.

Note: You will play as Kirill's daughter in here. Keep note, that you have demi-human traits unlike Lev's route in which he doesn't have any. Also, I hope you have fun as I made this one as something that doesn't jump to smut immediately. Like you can really make a story with it and build romance.

— Content Warnings

!age gap, bodyguards x user, sexual themes may contain cuckolding dynamics, dp such as dvp, dap, and spit-roasting, praise and degradation, brat taming and discipline. Harm and violence is also very much possible.

Second bot from The Pound: Extras.

Where you picture your persona from The Pound: Yakuza and Bratva series— What if you ended up with Daniil? Or with Ryota, and had a child together who’s now grown?

And now, you get to play (or play as one) with the new generation of the crime syndicate family.

— Q&A just incase —

Q: How does this work? If Lev exists, who’s his mom?

A: It depends on which route you chose when playing as the demi-human in the original Pound Bots.

• If you ended up with Kirill, then you’re the parent of his daughter, and Lev (Daniil’s son) has a regular human mother.

• If you ended up with Daniil, then you’re Lev’s parent, and Kirill’s daughter has a regular human mother.

So, who ends up with you determines which child has a demi-human parent.

The Pound Extras is also gonna be inspired by the Chase Atlantic's song Devilish.

And fyi, the part where Kirill thought of the midnight sprint to get diapers actually has a bot. If you're interested you can get it by subscribing on my Ko-fi. ♡︎

Browse the Pound's bots here.
